nodes.context: African American street gang founded in West Garfield Park, Chicago in the 1960s. Involved in drug trafficking, robbery, murder, and racketeering.
Chicago street gang that allied with Four Corner Hustlers to form People Nation.
Alliance of Chicago street gangs including Vice Lords, Four Corner Hustlers, Black P. Stones, and Latin Kings.
Chicago street gang and ally of Four Corner Hustlers within People Nation.
Chicago street gang and ally of Four Corner Hustlers within People Nation.
Rival alliance of Chicago street gangs opposing People Nation.
Chicago street gang and rival of Four Corner Hustlers, part of Folk Nation.

edges.context: Four Corner Hustlers and Vice Lords became allies, forming People Nation.
Four Corner Hustlers are a member of the People Nation alliance.
Black P. Stones are allies of Four Corner Hustlers within People Nation.
Latin Kings are allies of Four Corner Hustlers within People Nation.
Folk Nation is a rival alliance opposing Four Corner Hustlers and People Nation.
Gangster Disciples are rivals of Four Corner Hustlers, part of Folk Nation.
